meta.project: JanaNayagam Tamil Nadu Civic Command Center

product_overview: JanaNayagam is a Tamil Nadu civic command center that lets citizens sign in to submit grievances and lets government employees access role-scoped dashboards after Aadhaar-based onboarding. The portal supports district, constituency, ward, block, taluk, and department-level views for public service coordination.
core_goals: Let citizens sign in and access the grievance portal using phone and OTP-based login.
Let employees sign in using Aadhaar OTP and select their category, role, and jurisdiction scope.
Route employees to the correct dashboard based on their assigned role and jurisdiction.

features.name: Citizen Login
features.description: Allows citizens to verify their phone number with OTP, provide profile details, and enter the portal.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter phone number -> Request OTP -> Enter 6-digit OTP -> Verify OTP -> Enter name -> Enter pincode and select location -> Complete login

features.name: Employee Login & Scoping
features.description: Allows employees to authenticate with Aadhaar OTP, choose their employee category, and save role and jurisdiction scope before entering the correct dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /employee-login -> Enter Aadhaar number -> Request OTP -> Enter 6-digit OTP -> Select category -> Select role -> Select portfolio or jurisdiction -> Save scope and access dashboard

Navigate to /employee-login -> Enter Aadhaar number -> Request OTP -> Enter 6-digit OTP -> Select category -> Select role -> Select portfolio or jurisdiction -> Save scope and access dashboard -> See role-specific dashboard

routes.description: Employee login page with Aadhaar OTP eKYC
MLA dashboard for constituency stats and tickets

features.name: Employee Login & Scoping
features.description: Employee Aadhaar login and role/jurisdiction scoping onboarding
user_interactions: Select Category (Elected Representative, Administrative Officer, Department Official)
Select Role (CM, Minister, MLA, Ward Member, Collector, DRO, BDO, VAO, Ward Officer, RI)
Select Portfolio/Jurisdiction (Constituency, Department, District, Ward, Block, etc.)
Click Save Scope and Access Dashboard
